# defectdojo_dojo_group_member (Resource)

DefectDojo Dojo Group Member

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_dojo_group_member" "example" {
  group = 1
  user  = 1
  role  = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (Number) The ID of the Dojo Group
- `role` (Number) The role determining the permissions of the user to manage the group
- `user` (Number) The ID of the User

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_dojo_group_member.example 123
```
